title: Device Home screen - Software version
scenario: Software version is displayed in correct format on Device Home screen for Morpheus (X.Y) and Neo/Chronos (setid) devices in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected (e.g., Voyager Focus UC for Morpheus, or Voyager 5200 Series for Neo/Chronos).
3. Navigate to the Home screen of the app.
4. Locate the software/firmware version displayed on the Device Home screen.
5. Verify the format of the displayed version number.
expected: For Morpheus devices (e.g., Voyager Focus UC): The version is shown in X.Y format, where X is the firmware version and Y is the language version. For Neo and Chronos devices (e.g., Voyager 5200 Series): The version is shown in setid format (e.g., 0.0.285.1601).
